description:
About the job
Permanent Position based in the Inner South of Sydney CBD
Mature & Professional Culture with Exciting Projects
Design & Build Enterprise-grade Integration Solutions
Hybrid - 4 days on-site

The Role:
As a Senior Integration Engineer, your role will be to design, build, and maintain enterprise-grade integration solutions using Microsoft Azure Integration Services. The role is pivotal in enabling seamless connectivity, integrations, and automation across systems and applications, leveraging modern development methodologies and cloud-native technologies.

Core Responsibilities:
Lead the design and delivery of enterprise integration solutions that enable seamless connectivity across systems and applications.
Collaborate with ICT and business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into robust integration designs. 
Ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and aligned with organizational architecture and compliance standards. 
Drive the adoption of modern integration patterns and best practices across the team. 
Oversee the full integration lifecycle, including planning, development, testing, deployment, and ongoing support. 
Continuously monitor and optimize integration performance to meet service-level objectives. 
Champion automation and efficiency in integration and delivery processes. 
Act as a trusted advisor on integration-related matters within the organization.


Key Requirements & Expectations:
Expertise in Microsoft Azure Integration Services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, API Management).
Hands-on experience with messaging and event-driven patterns (Pub/Sub, CQRS).
Hands-on experience with Azure Functions and serverless architectures.
Strong experience with RESTful APIs and secure API design.
Proficiency in data transformation (JSON, XML, XSLT).
Familiarity with authentication protocols (OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect).
Solid experience with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools, preferably GitHub.
Scripting experience (PowerShell, Python).
Exposure to containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
Strong troubleshooting and performance optimization skills.


Why You?
This is a wonderful opportunity to join a close-knit team with a positive, professional, and mature environment nurtured by exceptional leaders where the business supports your growth, development, and success.

This well-established, stable, and growing business offers a great culture. Don't delay - apply today! Shortlisting will happen on a first-come, first-served basis until suitable candidates are selected. Thank you for your understanding. I look forward to learning more about you.

Please note that sponsorship is not on offer for this position.

email: talent@recruitmenthouse.com.au

Working together to make the best of 2026 🤝
